title: Neo XL Large Indoor Electric 3 Tier Airer Folding Foldable Laundry Clothes Horse Portable Heated Rail Rack Dryer Cover 36 Rails 147 cm…
features: Extra Large 36 Heated rails and open sided shelves for easy access.
Shelves can be folded for use in smaller spaces
Drying cover speeds up drying time also includes peg hangers Rating: 220-240VAC 50/60Hz 300W
Dimensions: 1.8M Cable length. Open: 148 x 70.5 x 73cm, Folded: 148 x 75 x 15.5cm (approx.)
description: The Neo WiFi clothes airer is a modern appliance that combines traditional clothes drying functionality with smart technology. This includes adjustment of temperature and timer with an app on your phone. This 3 Tier Upright Heated Airer saves energy and space! Drying 15kg wash on its 30 heated rails costs only 11p an hour to run. Just the thing for drying your washing indoors without the expense and energy use of a tumble dryer. Great for those rainy days and winter months when the washing line is out of action. All bars of the airer are heated for a quick drying of clothes, towels and bedding. It's lightweight foldable design means that it can be stored away easily in-between uses.
